message:
fix: use stored token for timing-safe length-mismatch comparison

In safeTokenEqual, the length-mismatch branch was comparing the
user-provided buffer to itself (bBuf, bBuf). This makes timing
proportional to attacker-controlled input length. Changed to compare
the stored token to itself (aBuf, aBuf) so timing is constant from
the attacker's perspective, matching the pattern in health/status
and admin/permissions routes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
